metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3980
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig 1A and B show that endogenous VPS35 highly overlaps with VAMP2, indicating that VPS35 is localised to synapses. Fig1C-F show by immuno EM that VPS35 is predominantly localised to presynaptic terminals (quantification in Fig1D), but is not present in all presynaptic terminals (Fig1C) in line with the not-complete overlap observed in confocal studies (Fig 1A-B).
Information on Antibody validation:
Fig S2a: Negative control processed in parallel with the immunolabelling with
VPS35 Cat. No. ab10099, but preincubating the primary antibody with the blocking peptide Cat. No. ab23181 at a ratio 5:1.
Fig S2b-c: Negative control processed in parallel with the immuno-gold labelling with VPS35, but without adding primary antibody, just bridging antibody and Protein A-gold.. Experimental description: Results "We first characterized the distribution of retromer in mouse hippocampal synapses."
